task_description: Implement Phase 7: Complete QML UI layer with all dashboard modules, pages, data-bound components, reusable widgets, enhanced themes, and C++ view models for ThreatOne Enterprise Desktop.

review_fixes_applied.issue_1_widget_imports: Added qml/widgets/qmldir and qml/themes/qmldir module files. Added explicit relative import statements to all pages, components, and widgets.
review_fixes_applied.issue_4_sidebar_index: Replaced fragile parent.parent.index traversal with pre-computed sectionOffsets array and computeFlatIndex() helper. Outer delegate exposes sectionIdx property for child access.
review_fixes_applied.issue_5_dual_source_of_truth: Aligned App.qml sample property values with page-level ViewModel stubs (securityScore=87, cpuUsage=0.42, totalEndpoints=342, etc.).
review_fixes_applied.v2_issue_1_threat_intel_path: Fixed path typo in NavigationSidebar.qml: changed pages/threatintel/ to pages/threat_intel/ to match actual filesystem path.
review_fixes_applied.v2_issue_2_dead_dedup_guard: Replaced dead objectName comparison in main.qml with a currentPagePath property that tracks the active page file path, enabling correct duplicate-navigation detection.
